descriptions.description: The 50ml Empire bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands choose this for a classic, decorative look. The distinctive silhouette stands out on vanity and retail displays.
The 50ml Empire bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers with tassel. A distinctive format for gift and luxury fragrance packaging.

The 50ml Empire bottle with an 18-415 neck built for fine mist sprayers. Perfume and fragrance mist brands use this for travel sizes and gift sets. The distinctive silhouette suits premium positioning.
The 50ml Empire dropper bottle with an 18-415 neck. Essential oils, perfume oils, beard oil, and concentrated blends dispense precisely. A clean format for aromatherapy and fragrance brands.
The 50ml Empire reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and open-mouth formats for fragrance and aftershave. A classic pour-over application.
The 50ml Empire bottle with an 18-415 neck for lotion pumps. Serums and light creams dispense cleanly. Skincare brands use this for travel and trial sizes.

A three-ounce Empire bottle with an 18-415 neck ready for lotion pumps. Body lotion, hand cream, and face cream brands choose this for a premium feel. The distinctive silhouette stands out on displays.
A three-ounce Empire reducer bottle with an 18-415 neck. Splash-on cologne and concentrated fragrance formats. The distinctive silhouette suits luxury positioning.
A three-ounce Empire bottle with an 18-415 neck for fine mist sprayers. Full-size perfume and body mist formats. The distinctive silhouette suits premium positioning.
A three-ounce Empire bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers. Perfume and cologne brands use this for a decorative, full-size format.
A three-ounce Empire bottle with an 18-415 neck for vintage bulb sprayers with tassel. A distinctive format for gift and luxury fragrance packaging.
